.gitignore.general_idea: Add Eclipse IDE metadata files to .gitignore to prevent committing local development environment configuration.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties to Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation fails on JDK 21 if source/target are set to 1.8, as the compiler cannot process Java 21 language features or may reject the mismatched version.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace Spark Java web framework with Spring Boot Web Starter.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spark Java is not part of the new Spring Boot ecosystem; the application logic has been migrated to Spring MVC, requiring the new starter for compilation and runtime.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace embedded Tomcat with Undertow in Spring Boot.
pom.xml.why_exists: The application configuration expects Undertow as the servlet container; using the default Tomcat starter would cause runtime configuration mismatches or classpath conflicts if Undertow classes are expected.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace SLF4J Simple binding with Spring Boot Logging Starter.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot requires its own logging starter to configure Logback/SLF4J correctly; the old simple binding is incompatible with Spring Boot's auto-configuration.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Spring Boot Thymeleaf Starter for template rendering.
pom.xml.why_exists: The application uses Thymeleaf templates which require the starter for auto-configuration and classpath availability.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Thymeleaf Layout Dialect dependency.
pom.xml.why_exists: Templates use layout dialect features that require this specific library to be on the classpath.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Spring Boot Cache Starter for caching support.
pom.xml.why_exists: Application code uses Spring Cache annotations which require the starter for auto-configuration.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Spring Boot DevTools for development-time features.
pom.xml.why_exists: Optional dependency for development convenience, not strictly required for compilation but part of the new setup.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add SpringDoc OpenAPI Starter for API documentation.
pom.xml.why_exists: Application exposes OpenAPI documentation which requires this library.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Spring Boot Validation Starter for bean validation.
pom.xml.why_exists: Application uses validation annotations which require the starter for auto-configuration.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Feign dependencies from Netflix to OpenFeign and bump versions.
pom.xml.why_exists: Netflix Feign is deprecated/removed in newer Spring Cloud versions; OpenFeign is the required implementation for Spring Boot 3.x.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Lombok dependency for boilerplate reduction.
pom.xml.why_exists: Source code uses Lombok annotations which require the processor to be present during compilation.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Spring Boot Test Starter for testing.
pom.xml.why_exists: Test classes use Spring Boot test annotations and utilities which require this starter.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update JUnit dependency to use managed version and scope.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot manages JUnit versions; explicit old versions may conflict or lack necessary features for Spring Boot 3 testing.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update AssertJ dependency to use managed version.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot manages AssertJ versions; explicit old versions may be incompatible with newer JUnit or Spring Boot test utilities.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Apache POI dependencies for Excel file handling in tests.
pom.xml.why_exists: Test code uses Apache POI classes which must be on the classpath.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Apache XMLBeans dependency for POI support.
pom.xml.why_exists: Apache POI OOXML support requires XMLBeans to be on the classpath.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace Maven Shade Plugin with Spring Boot Maven Plugin for repackaging.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot applications require the specific repackaging goal to create executable jars with embedded dependencies; the shade plugin does not perform this correctly for Spring Boot.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add SASS Maven Plugin for CSS compilation.
pom.xml.why_exists: Build process requires SASS files to be compiled to CSS; this plugin provides that functionality.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Maven Compiler Plugin configuration for Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Explicitly configuring the compiler plugin ensures Java 21 features are enabled and compatible with the target JDK.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Spring Boot Dependencies BOM for version management.
pom.xml.why_exists: Centralizes version management for Spring Boot starters and related libraries, ensuring compatibility.

pom.xml.general_idea: Rename artifact ID from dashboard to bdxjug-api.
pom.xml.why_exists: Reflects the new project identity and structure.

pom.xml.general_idea: Rename final build name from bdxjug-dashboard to bdxjug-api.
pom.xml.why_exists: Consistent with the new artifact ID.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Gson dependency to use managed version.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot manages Gson version; explicit old version may conflict.
